understood_request: The user wants a total count of products in the inventory system.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hub_product (
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  product_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO hub_product
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  CAST(product_id AS VARCHAR) AS product_bk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'erp.products' AS record_source
FROM stg_erp_products
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM hub_product h
  WHERE h.product_bk = CAST(stg_erp_products.product_id AS VARCHAR)
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_product_details (
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  sku VARCHAR,
  unit_cost BIGINT,
  list_price BIGINT,
  safety_stock BIGINT,
  reorder_point BIGINT,
  product_line VARCHAR,
  product_class VARCHAR,
  size VARCHAR,
  weight_lbs DOUBLE
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_product_details
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'erp.products' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_name AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.sku AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.unit_cost AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.list_price AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.safety_stock AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.reorder_point AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_line AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_class AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.size AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.weight_lbs AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  s.product_name,
  s.sku,
  s.unit_cost,
  s.list_price,
  s.safety_stock,
  s.reorder_point,
  s.product_line,
  s.product_class,
  s.size,
  s.weight_lbs
FROM stg_erp_products s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_product_details sat
  WHERE sat.product_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_name AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.sku AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.unit_cost AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.list_price AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.safety_stock AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.reorder_point AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_line AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.product_class AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.size AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.weight_lbs AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_product_count (
  total_product_count BIGINT,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_product_count; INSERT INTO mart_product_count SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hp.product_bk) AS total_product_count, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_product hp INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk WHERE spd.load_end_dts IS NULL
